items.docs: Returns the health status of the Kroki service.

params.name: diagram_type
params.description: The type of diagram to generate. Supported types: plantuml, mermaid, graphviz, blockdiag, seqdiag, actdiag, nwdiag, packetdiag, rackdiag, bpmn, bytefield, c4plantuml, d2, dbml, ditaa, erd, excalidraw, nomnoml, pikchr, structurizr, svgbob, symbolator, tikz, umlet, vega, vega-lite, wavedrom, wireviz

params.name: output_format
params.description: Output format for the diagram. Supported formats: svg, png, jpeg, pdf (availability depends on diagram type)

params.name: encoded_diagram
params.description: Deflate + base64url encoded diagram source text

items.docs: Generates a diagram from an encoded source using a GET request. The diagram source must be compressed with deflate and encoded in base64url format. The diagram type and output format are specified in the URL path.

params.name: diagram_type
params.description: The type of diagram to generate. Supported types: plantuml, mermaid, graphviz, blockdiag, seqdiag, actdiag, nwdiag, bpmn, c4plantuml, d2, ditaa, erd, excalidraw, nomnoml, structurizr, svgbob, umlet, vega, vega-lite, wavedrom, wireviz

params.name: output_format
params.description: Output format for the diagram (svg, png, jpeg, pdf)

items.docs: Generates a diagram from a plain-text source using a POST request. The diagram source is sent in the request body. Supports plain text (text/plain) or JSON (application/json) with a "diagram_source" key. The output format is specified in the URL path.
